title: manteia stellata
intro: Manteia stellata, also known as Starflower, is a perennial plant in the Campanulaceae family, native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Manteia stellata include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and soothing sore throats. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
